creator: buganini@gmail.com
text:
Or just use same version and distfile?
http://security-hole.info/~buganini/ports/p5-bsdconv.patch
http://security-hole.info/~buganini/ports/php5-bsdconv.patch
while the wrapper code wasn't changed.

Thanks,
Buganini

> Thanks,
